summary: Comprehensive testing of Suppliers feature (NEW) completed. All backend APIs pass 100% (12/12 tests). All frontend UI tests pass 100%. The Suppliers page mirrors the Clients page with full CRUD, search, dialog form, and card-based display.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/suppliers without auth returns 401
Backend: POST /api/suppliers without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/suppliers returns list with count and total
Backend: POST /api/suppliers creates a new supplier (201)
Backend: GET /api/suppliers/:id returns single supplier
Backend: PUT /api/suppliers/:id updates a supplier
Backend: DELETE /api/suppliers/:id deletes a supplier
Backend: GET /api/suppliers?search=acme filters by name
Backend: GET /api/suppliers?search=email filters by email
Backend: GET /api/suppliers?search=company filters by company
Backend: GET /api/suppliers/:id with nonexistent ID returns 404
Frontend: Suppliers page loads at /suppliers with data-testid='suppliers-page'
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Suppliers' nav item with Truck icon
Frontend: 'Add Supplier' button visible (data-testid='add-supplier-btn')
Frontend: Click 'Add Supplier' opens dialog with form fields (name, email, phone, company, address, notes)
Frontend: Submit form creates new supplier and it appears in list
Frontend: Supplier card shows name, email, phone, company with edit/delete buttons
Frontend: Search input filters suppliers (data-testid='search-suppliers')
Frontend: Edit supplier dialog pre-fills data and updates on save
Frontend: Delete supplier removes it from the list
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed suppliers during testing. One existing supplier 'Acme Supplies' (orders@acmesupplies.com) remains.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Suppliers feature fully tested and working. Backend: Node.js Express with MongoDB, routes at /api/suppliers (JWT protected). Frontend: Next.js page at /suppliers with Dialog form for create/edit, card grid display, search with debounce. All data-testid attributes properly implemented. Supplier schema: name (required), email (required), phone, address, company, notes. The feature mirrors the existing Clients page pattern.
